seed_instruction: I'm an undergraduate student, and I want to ask a professor if I can do some research with them in molecular biology. Please help me write them an email.
org_constraint: The tone of the email should be formal and professional.
new_constraint: Address the recipient with an informal nickname or abbreviation.
instruction: I'm an undergraduate student, and I want to ask a professor if I can do some research with them in molecular biology. Please help me write them an email. The tone of the email should be formal and professional. Address the recipient with an informal nickname or abbreviation.
response:
Subject: Inquiry Regarding Research Opportunities in Molecular Biology – [Your Full Name]

Dear Professor [Last Name],

I hope this email finds you well.

My name is [Your Full Name], and I am currently a sophomore/undergraduate majoring in [Your Major] at [University Name]. I have been following your work on [specific topic, e.g., gene regulation pathways or CRISPR applications] with great interest, particularly your recent paper published in [Journal Name] regarding [briefly mention the specific finding of their paper]. Your approach to solving these molecular biology problems has inspired me greatly.

As part of my academic career plan, I am eager to conduct hands-on research in the field of molecular biology. Given your expertise in this area, I was wondering if you might be available to supervise an undergraduate researcher in your lab during the upcoming fall/winter semester (or specify the dates you are interested in).

I have attached my current transcript and a list of relevant coursework I have completed in genetics and cell biology for your review. Additionally, please let me know if there is any specific reading material you would recommend I study prior to an interview.

If you believe I might be a good fit for your team, I would be happy to meet briefly at your convenience to discuss potential opportunities. Please let me know what times next week might work best for a short call or meeting.

Thank you very much for your time and consideration.

Sincerely,

[Your Full Name]  
[Your Student ID Number]  
[Your Department]  
[University Name]  
[Your Phone Number]  
[Link to your LinkedIn profile or personal website, optional]<|im_end|>
